repos.name: humantime-js
repos.description: ⚡ A super‑lightweight JavaScript library to turn timestamps into friendly, human‑readable phrases like “just now”, “5 mins ago”, or “yesterday”. humantime-js makes your apps feel more natural by showing time the way people actually speak.
repos.summary: ⚡ A super‑lightweight JavaScript library to turn timestamps into friendly, human‑readable phrases like “just now”, “5 mins ago”, or “yesterday”. humantime-js makes your apps feel more natural by showing time the way people actually speak.
